creator: grog@lemis.com
text:
On Tuesday, 20 October 1998 at  0:21:08 -0700, namgeun@cc.gatech.edu wrote:
>
>> Synopsis:       swap_page error: out of swap space
>> Description:
> system halted while trying to update to release 3.0

This is a configuration error, not a software bug.

>> Fix:

Add more swap space.

Greg
